import { useState } from "react"; import { Calendar, Clock, MapPin, Users, Ticket, ImagePlus, } from "lucide-react"; import "./CreateEventPage.css"; function CreateEventPage() { const [event, setEvent] = useState({ title: "", category: "Музика", date: "", time: "", city: "", place: "", format: "Офлайн", maxMembers: "", price: "", description: "", image: "", }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setEvent({ ...event, [name]: value }); }; const handleImageChange = (e) => { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (file) { setEvent({ ...event, image: URL.createObjectURL(file) }); } }; return (
